description: A user reports they are unable to print to the main office printer, getting an 'access denied' error.

nodes.task_description: Verify the printer is online and accessible on the network.

expected_outcome.value: The technician pings the printer successfully and can access its web interface.

nodes.task_description: Restart the print spooler service on the user's computer.

expected_outcome.value: Restarting the spooler does not resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Remove and re-add the printer on the user's computer, forcing it to re-download the driver and settings.

expected_outcome.value: Re-installing the printer resolves the access issue and the user can now print.
